_regulons_description: Named list of regulon constituent genes (from SCENIC or similar).
_expression_matrix_description: Gene expression matrix (genes in rows, cells in columns).
_target_modulon_description: Name/ID of the modulon to perturb (from ModulonSelect results).
_comb_size_description: Number of TF knockouts per combination to rank.
_weights_file_description: Optional TF-target weight data frame (columns: TF, Target, weight). Null uses unit weights.
_generate_plots_description: When true (default), save a horizontal barplot of the top TF KO combinations to Results/.
_top_n_description: Number of top-ranked combinations to include in the barplot (default: 30).
